auth.welcomeMessage: Sign in to continue to your workspace.
auth.registerDescription: Set up your account to start using the app.
auth.name: Full name
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.

navigation.menuDescription: Browse core areas of the deploy platform.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Manage your deployed projects, environments, and delivery workflow here.

githubWarning.title: Connect GitHub before creating a project
githubWarning.description: This deploy platform needs a connected GitHub account before it can link repositories and create new projects.
githubWarning.helper: Connect GitHub from your account settings to continue.

connected.title: GitHub connected successfully
connected.description: Your GitHub account is now connected. You can continue linking repositories and creating projects.

cancelled.title: GitHub connection was cancelled
cancelled.description: No changes were made to your GitHub connection. You can try again whenever you are ready.

error.title: GitHub connection failed
error.description: We could not complete the GitHub connection. Please try again or check the integration settings.

reasons.access_denied: You denied GitHub access, so the connection was not completed.
reasons.invalid_state: The GitHub authorization request is no longer valid. Please try connecting again.
reasons.user_not_found: We could not find your account in the system. Please sign in again and retry.
reasons.already_connected: Your account is already connected to GitHub.
reasons.account_in_use: This GitHub account is already linked to another user.
reasons.authorization_expired: The GitHub authorization code expired before it could be completed. Please try again.
reasons.oauth_configuration_error: The GitHub integration is currently misconfigured. Please check the integration settings.
reasons.connection_failed: We could not complete the GitHub connection. Please try again in a moment.

states.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading the current page of projects.
states.emptyDescription: Projects will appear here after your first repository is connected.
states.noResultsDescription: Try another keyword or clear the current search.

projectDetail.description: See where this project deploys from, what the latest deployment looks like, and where deployment observability will appear next.

confirm.deleteProjectDescription: This action permanently removes the project and its related configuration.

states.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading the project detail page.

deploymentStatus.title: Deployment status
deploymentStatus.description: A focused summary of the most recent deploy so users can immediately understand what is running now.
deploymentStatus.emptyDescription: This project is connected and ready, but deployment execution has not been wired into this phase yet.
deploymentStatus.noCommitMessage: No commit message was captured for this deployment.

action.title: Run completion
action.pending: Finish time will appear here once the deploy completes.

overview.title: Where this project deploys from
overview.description: Key source, build, and runtime settings so a user can quickly understand what repository, branch, and runner are attached to this project.

runtime.title: Runtime target
runtime.description: Container and host wiring that the platform will use when deployment execution is turned on.

webhook.title: Repository webhook
webhook.summaryConnected: This project already has a webhook identifier, so repository events can be mapped to it.
webhook.summaryPending: Webhook provisioning has not completed yet, so repository events are not connected to deployments.
webhook.nextStepConnected: When deployment execution is added, this card can expand with delivery health and recent webhook activity.
webhook.nextStepPending: Once the backend finishes provisioning a webhook, the ID and delivery health can live here.

envVars.title: Environment variables
envVars.description: Store secrets and config per project for runtime, build time, or both.

states.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading the environment variable list.
states.emptyDescription: Add runtime or build variables here so this project is ready for the next deployment phase.

dialog.createDescription: Create one variable at a time and choose whether it should be available during build, runtime, or both.
dialog.editDescription: Update the key, scope, enabled state, or replace the stored secret value.

key.label: Variable key
key.description: Use a shell-safe key such as DATABASE_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL.

value.label: Secret value
value.description: The value is encrypted before it is stored.
value.editDescription: Leave this blank to keep the current secret. Enter a new value to replace it.
value.editPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current secret

scope.label: Where should this variable be available?
scope.runtimeDescription: Write it into the runtime .env file when deployments run.
scope.buildDescription: Pass it into docker build as a build-time variable.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Disabled variables stay stored but will be skipped in later deployment phases.

confirm.deleteDescription: This variable will be removed from the project configuration.

validation.keyInvalid: Use only letters, numbers, and underscores, and start with a letter or underscore.
validation.scopeRequired: Select at least one availability option.

shared.previewDescription: This section is already placed in the page flow so future deployment features can plug in without reshaping the whole screen.
shared.placeholderDescription: Content intentionally stays lightweight for now because this phase focuses on project detail structure.

history.title: Deployment history
history.description: A dedicated area for chronological deploy runs, release outcomes, and future filtering controls.
history.helperDescription: We are reserving a stable block for deployment cards, pagination, and commit-level history once the deployment phase starts.

logs.title: Realtime logs
logs.helperDescription: This layout is intentionally sized for a terminal-like stream, filters, and tail controls in the next phase.
logs.listHint: SYSTEM logs come from the platform itself, while STDOUT and STDERR reflect command output.
logs.emptyDescription: Platform events, command output, and health updates will appear here once a deployment starts emitting log lines.

deleteProject.title: Delete project
deleteProject.description: This action removes the project and its related configuration from the workspace. You cannot undo it.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Inspect build output, runtime logs, and operational events across your platform.
logs.selectionSummaryDescription: Use the selectors above to jump between projects and deployment runs on smaller screens.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Pick a project first, then inspect its recent deployment runs.
projects.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading the project rail.
projects.emptyDescription: Projects will appear here after your first repository is connected.
projects.noResultsDescription: Try another keyword or clear the current search.

deployments.title: Deployments
deployments.description: Recent runs for the selected project, sorted from newest to oldest.
deployments.errorDescription: We could not load deployment history for this project.
deployments.emptyDescription: Trigger a deployment first, then its run history will appear here.
deployments.noCommitMessage: No commit message captured for this run.

terminal.title: Deployment log stream
terminal.description: Choose a project and deployment run to inspect the terminal output.

states.errorDescription: We could not load the terminal output for this deployment.
states.noProjectDescription: Once a project is selected, its recent deployment runs will appear beside the terminal.
states.noDeploymentDescription: Select one deployment run to inspect its log output.
states.emptyDescription: This deployment has not emitted any log lines yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View a high-level overview of platform health, usage, and recent activity.

newProject.title: Create project
newProject.description: Link a GitHub repository, choose the deploy branch, and configure the build/runtime settings for your next deployment.

card.title: Project setup
card.description: Start with the repository, then review the build and runtime settings before creating the project.

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Pick the repository that will back this project and confirm the project identity.

build.title: Build configuration
build.description: Optional paths let you adapt this project to monorepos or custom Docker layouts.

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.description: Set the ports and deployment behavior that should be used when the container runs.

repositories.empty: No repositories are available yet. Connect GitHub or create a repository first.
repositories.emptySearch: No repositories match the current keyword.

githubRepoId.label: GitHub repository
githubRepoId.description: Search by owner, repo name, or default branch.

name.label: Project name
name.description: This name is shown in your project list and deployment views.

deployBranch.label: Deploy branch
deployBranch.description: Choose one of the available branches from the selected repository.

rootDirectory.label: Root directory
rootDirectory.description: Optional. Useful when the app lives in a subfolder of a monorepo.

dockerfilePath.label: Dockerfile path
dockerfilePath.description: Optional. Override the default Dockerfile location.

buildContext.label: Build context
buildContext.description: Optional. Choose a custom build context if Docker should build from another path.

containerPort.label: Container port
containerPort.description: Optional. Leave empty to let the backend use its default port.

hostPort.label: Host port
hostPort.description: Optional. Leave empty to let the platform assign or persist no host port.

autoDeploy.label: Enable auto deploy
autoDeploy.description: Automatically trigger deployments when new commits land on the selected branch.

branches.empty: No branches are available for this repository.
branches.selectRepositoryFirst: Select a repository to load branches first.

errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource could not be found.
errors.CONFLICT: This data conflicts with an existing record.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Submitted data is invalid. Please review and try again.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again later.
errors.DATABASE_ERROR: A database error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_MISSING: Your session is missing refresh credentials. Please sign in again.
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session is invalid. Please sign in again.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_REVOKED: Your session has been revoked. Please sign in again.
errors.TOKEN_REVOKED: Your access has been revoked. Please sign in again.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST_ORIGIN: This request origin is not allowed.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_ROLE: Your account does not have the required permissions.
errors.NOT_CONNECTED_GITHUB_YET: You are not connect Github yet
errors.CANNOT_GET_LIST_REPOS_FROM_GITHUB: Unable to fetch repositories from GitHub! Please try again!
errors.NOT_ACCESS_TO_PROJECT: You do not have permission to access this project.
errors.PROJECT_NOT_DEPLOYABLE: This project cannot be deployed with its current configuration.
errors.PROJECT_NOT_ACTIVE: Only active projects can be deployed.
errors.PROJECT_RUNNER_NOT_SUPPORTED: This project's deployment runner is not supported yet.
errors.PROJECT_DEPLOY_CONFIG_MISSING: This project is missing required deployment configuration.
errors.ACTIVE_DEPLOYMENT_EXISTS: A deployment is already in progress for this project.
errors.HOST_PORT_ALREADY_EXISTS: Host port is already in use. Please use a different port!
errors.GITHUB_REPO_ALREADY_EXISTS: This GitHub repo has already been created!
errors.ENV_VAR_KEY_ALREADY_EXISTS: This environment variable key already exists in the project.
